raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 525 aims to address the mental health challenges faced by children due to school closures during the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "The California Department of Public Health will collaborate with the California Department of Education to develop a statewide approach to the mental health crisis in schools.",
    "Children have experienced significant changes in their lives due to school closures resulting from COVID-19.",
    "Prioritizing student health should encompass physical, emotional, psychological, and social well-being.",
    "Research indicates that isolation, physical distancing, and remote learning have a detrimental impact on children's mental health.",
    "The long-term effects of school closures and adjustments to learning environments on students' mental health are still being studied."
  ]
}
```
